subcodes.title: Epistle to Muhammad Shah 4
subcodes.first_line: This is an Epistle from Him Who is the true, the undoubted Leader. Herein is revealed the law of all things
subcodes.first_line_orig: بسم الله الرحمن الرحیم. ان هذا کتاب من لدن امام حق مبین فیه حکم کل شیء لمن اراد ان یتذکر او یکون من المهتدین
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @words vs deeds, @proclamation to kings; rulers; prominent individuals, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @station of the Manifestation of God, @power of the Manifestation of God

writing_refs.type_name: Selections from the Writings of the Báb
